key_insights.insight: Imposter syndrome can be a powerful driver for improvement and achievement, pushing individuals to constantly strive for better results.
key_insights.quote: I always say, had I not had my imposter syndrome, had I not had the need to be better? I mean, I never look at anything I've done and think this is amazing. I'm always, no. I'm like, how can I do better?

key_insights.insight: For those who have faced difficult experiences, it is important to find a sense of belonging.
key_insights.quote: I had to belong somewhere. I never felt I really belonged anywhere.

key_insights.insight: Success driven by fear can lead to workaholism and neglecting other important aspects of life.
key_insights.quote: The signals were like you know not not really sleeping yeah not really never engaging with people on a one-to-one always being better with with crowds of people around avoidance you know avoiding certain situations certain people who are quote unquotegood for you um avoiding people who you really loved before and who were really kind to you all of a sudden avoiding them for a new group of shiny people

key_insights.insight: Developing a spiritual side and engaging in service can provide a new perspective and help deal with the world and relationships.
key_insights.quote: And that really gave me a spiritual side to be able to deal with the world.

key_insights.insight: It's essential to protect and nurture one's talent, understanding its value rather than destroying it due to insecurities or external pressures.
key_insights.quote: I know that when you're given a talent I don't know where that comes from you have to protect it you have to nurture it you have to but when you're young in your 20s and you have money and and jobs are coming to you you just don't you don't see the value

key_insights.insight: Having a supportive partner can provide a sense of grounding, kindness, and a safe space to navigate life's challenges.
key_insights.quote: Without him, I wouldn't be here. I wouldn't even,I probably wouldn't even want to carry on doing what I do,but he's so excited...he's my my you know my home, my safe space.

key_insights.insight: Mentorship plays a crucial role in guiding young talents and shaping their careers.
key_insights.quote: It's so important for young people to have mentors because had I not been looked after, I don't know where I would be.

key_insights.insight: It is crucial to create a safe space where women can feel welcomed and seen.
key_insights.quote: But i wanted to create a place or a safe place where women could just feel welcomed. Because I always remember my mother always said to me, if you can see it, you can be it.

actionable_advice.advice: Prioritize self-reflection and meditation to avoid burnout and maintain mental well-being.
actionable_advice.how_to: Set aside dedicated time each day for self-reflection, whether through meditation, journaling, or simply quiet contemplation.

actionable_advice.advice: Set boundaries and be willing to leave situations that are not fulfilling or healthy.
actionable_advice.how_to: Evaluate your commitments and relationships, and identify those that drain your energy or compromise your values. Be prepared to say 'no' or walk away.

actionable_advice.advice: Find a 'tribe' of people who understand your experiences and can provide support and guidance.
actionable_advice.how_to: Actively seek out individuals who share your background, identity, or goals. Nurture these relationships and lean on them for support.

actionable_advice.advice: When entering an institution, don't be afraid to question the status quo and ask 'why' things are done a certain way.
actionable_advice.how_to: Challenge conventional wisdom and propose alternative approaches to foster innovation and inclusivity.

actionable_advice.advice: Build and nurture relationships with your family, especially your parents.
actionable_advice.how_to: Spend quality time with them, build bridges, and express your appreciation.

memorable_stories: Being stopped at Vogue security because the security assumed he was the delivery man.
Throwing his belongings out the window after he was dropped from university.
Getting contact lenses, getting stopped to be a model on a train.
Losing his passport and arriving to Dolce & Gabbana with a bottle of vodka.
His mother's reaction on being offered a modeling contract
Experiencing racism and being detained at Gatwick airport.
contrarian_claims: Diversity is not downmarket; diversity sells.
Mentors in AA came from all walks of life.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Editor Of Vogue (Edward Enninful OBE): How To Become No.1 In Your Industry Against All The Odds!
